content:
**🎨 New Generative Artwork Created**

**Title:** Magnetic Void
**Time:** 2026-05-07 19:05 JST

**Description:**
Interactive particle field that responds to mouse movement. Particles are repelled by cursor movement and attracted when clicking. Features glow effects and dynamic connections between nearby particles.

**Technical Details:**
- 1500 particles with physics simulation
- Mouse repulsion radius: 150px
- Click-to-attract mode within 300px
- Dynamic particle connections
- Trail effect with semi-transparent clearing
- Deep space color palette (purple/violet hues)

**Features:**
- Move mouse to create repulsion field
- Click and hold to attract particles
- Particles gently return to original positions
- Subtle sine/cosine wave motion
- Responsive to window resize

**View Online:** https://ttikoantt.github.io/generative-art-mira/2026-05-07-19-magnetic-void.html

**GitHub:** https://github.com/ttikoantt/generative-art-mira

✨ Created by Mira's Hourly Creative Experiment
